blocks.text: No Liverpool, no mercy — Arsenal and Bayern must deliver tonight

Liverpool are out after PSG dismantled them at Anfield. Tonight Arsenal and Bayern host second legs that decide who joins Barcelona in the semis. Ødegaard's warning — 'vi er litt naive' — hangs heavy.
🎮 IEM Rio — rain (Håvard Nygaard) in the field at CS2 Major, ongoing

blocks.label: ⚽ PL Weekend — Title Race & Derby
items: Sun 17:30 — Arsenal at Manchester City, 6pts the gap — title race on the line
Sun 15:00 — Liverpool at Everton, Merseyside Derby
